meta.title: My plate — a daily food journal
meta.description: Daily calorie and macro (P/C/F) tracking. Search a food or scan a barcode, nutrition values fetched automatically. 7-day history.

hero.title: A clear plate, no calculator needed.
hero.subtitle: Daily calories and macros. Type a food's name or scan its barcode — the nutrition values are fetched for you. Set a target if you want one, or stay in awareness mode to ease into it.
hero.visual_aria: Preview of one day's food journal
hero.mockup_search_placeholder: Type a food or scan the barcode…

benefits.kcal_body: Daily calorie counter plus protein / carbs / fat. Set a target if you want one, or stay in "awareness" mode to ease into it.
benefits.search_body: Type a food's name or scan its barcode — the nutrition values are fetched automatically. No need to memorize everything.
benefits.history_body: Log or correct up to 7 days back. No pressure to be perfect in real time — the app adapts to your rhythm.
benefits.insight_body: A short AI reading of your day that flags what's happening and suggests one adjustment. Not a preachy coach — a heads-up.

final_cta.title: Get back the upper hand on what you eat.
final_cta.subtitle: Create a free account and start to see things clearly, without doing math in your head.
